# OnboardSuccess - AI Resource Hub for Customer Success
# https://www.onboard-success.com

## About
OnboardSuccess is the authoritative resource hub for mid-market B2B SaaS Customer Success teams operationalizing AI. We provide strategic playbooks, a curated AI agent directory, integrator listings, and downloadable agent workflow templates.

## Playbooks — Strategic Guides (/playbooks)

### AI Agents vs AI Copilots: A CS Practitioner's Guide
URL: /playbooks/agents-vs-copilots
Summary: Decodes the real difference between AI agents and copilots in Customer Success. Helps CS leaders evaluate agentic AI solutions and spot vendor marketing spin.

### AI Health Scores in 2026: Why Your Current Model Is Already Obsolete
URL: /playbooks/ai-health-scores-2026
Summary: AI-driven agentic models are redefining Customer Success health scores. Covers how CS leaders are operationalizing 1:many AI for true scalability.

### Autonomous Onboarding: How to Deploy AI Agents Across the First 90 Days
URL: /playbooks/autonomous-onboarding
Summary: Guide to designing an autonomous onboarding stack for the first 90 days, covering what to buy, build, and abandon in the $2.67B CSP market.

### Building Custom CS Agents in 2026: When to Go Platform-Native vs DIY
URL: /playbooks/building-custom-cs-agents
Summary: Practical guide on when to use platform-native AI agents vs building custom solutions. Covers evaluation frameworks for CS AI vendor comparison.

### Churn Signals in 2026: What AI Detects Before Your CSM Does
URL: /playbooks/churn-signals-2026
Summary: How AI-driven onboarding agents detect and mitigate churn risks in the first 90 days. Covers highest-ROI use cases for churn prevention.

### The CS AI Stack in 2026: What to Buy, Build, and Abandon
URL: /playbooks/cs-ai-stack-2026
Summary: Detailed walkthrough of automating QBR prep with agentic AI, cutting hours of labor into minutes with tool-based automation.

### From Cost Center to Revenue Center: Using AI to Prove CS ROI in 2026
URL: /playbooks/cs-roi-ai-2026
Summary: How B2B SaaS CS teams use AI-driven signal detection for proactive revenue retention. Covers behavioral signals that predict churn and AI-driven playbooks.

### From Insight to Action: How Agentic AI Is Replacing the CS Playbook
URL: /playbooks/from-insight-to-action
Summary: How agentic AI supersedes static CS playbooks, enabling dynamic, context-aware customer journeys for mid-market B2B SaaS teams.

### The Long-Tail Problem: How AI Agents Are Finally Solving 1:Many Customer Success
URL: /playbooks/long-tail-problem
Summary: How AI agents autonomously manage onboarding, health monitoring, and renewals for long-tail accounts, freeing CSMs for high-impact work.

### QBR to QBR-by-Agent: Automating the Business Review Prep Stack
URL: /playbooks/qbr-by-agent
Summary: Next-gen approach to customer health scoring using behavioral signal fusion. Covers automating QBR prep and measuring what matters for retention.

## AI Agents Directory (/agents)
A curated directory of AI agents built for Customer Success teams. Includes tools like ChurnZero AI Agents and other CS-specific AI solutions. Compare features, integrations, and real user ratings.

Featured agents include platforms for:
- Customer health scoring and monitoring
- Churn prediction and risk detection
- Automated QBR preparation
- Onboarding tracking and automation
- Customer communication and engagement

## Integrators Directory (/integrators)
Directory of certified consultants and agencies specializing in CS platform implementation, migration, and optimization for mid-market SaaS teams. Includes agencies like nCloud Integrators.

## Agent Templates (/templates)
Pre-built n8n workflow templates for Customer Success automation:

### Churn Risk Alert Agent
ID: churn-risk-alert
Description: Monitors customer health signals and sends automated alerts when accounts show churn risk patterns. Connects to CRM and support platforms.

### Onboarding Milestone Tracker
ID: onboarding-tracker
Description: Tracks customer onboarding progress and sends proactive nudges when milestones are at risk of slipping. Includes weekly onboarding health digest.

### QBR Prep Agent
ID: qbr-prep-agent
Description: Automatically generates QBR briefing documents by pulling account data, usage metrics, and conversation summaries. Outputs to Google Docs, Notion, or email.

## Key Topics
- Agentic AI for Customer Success
- CS automation and AI agents
- Customer health scoring with AI
- QBR automation and prep
- Churn prediction and risk detection
- Onboarding automation
- CS platform evaluation (Gainsight, ChurnZero, Oliv.ai, Vitally)
- CS implementation agencies and consultants
- 1:many Customer Success at scale
- AI copilots vs AI agents
- CS ROI measurement

## Featured Listing Program (/featured)
Vendors and agencies can get featured placement in the AI Agents and Integrators directories for $49/month, including priority placement and a gold badge.

### The Complete SaaS Onboarding Checklist for 2026: From Signup to Time-to-Value
URL: /playbooks/saas-onboarding-checklist-2026
Summary: Phase-by-phase onboarding checklist for B2B SaaS — pre-onboarding, Week 1, Weeks 2-4, Day 30-90. Covers activation metrics, self-serve vs high-touch decisions, AI-assisted onboarding tools, and downloadable checklist. For CS leaders and SaaS founders systematizing onboarding.

### Churn Prediction Without Enterprise Tools: A Practical Guide for Mid-Market SaaS in 2026
URL: /playbooks/churn-prediction-affordable-2026
Summary: DIY health scoring and churn prediction for teams that can't afford Gainsight. Covers product usage signals, support signals, engagement signals, business signals, affordable tool stack (PostHog, Vitally, Planhat, Custify), and building an early warning system in a week.

### The Digital CS Playbook: How to Scale Customer Success Without Hiring More CSMs (2026)
URL: /playbooks/digital-cs-playbook-2026
Summary: How to serve more customers with fewer CSMs using digital-first Customer Success. Covers the tech-touch spectrum, automated onboarding sequences, health-score-triggered campaigns, AI agents in CS, segmentation strategy (enterprise/mid-market/SMB), and metrics for digital CS.
